name: khenrix-utils
description: Shared khenrix capabilities for Codex: the khenrix-setup reconcile skill plus the LLM-agnostic source of truth (MCP servers, settings, base instructions).

interface.shortDescription: Reconcile Codex with the shared khenrix capabilities
interface.longDescription: Installs the khenrix-setup skill, which reviews Codex's MCP servers, settings and AGENTS.md against capabilities.toml and additively syncs them with Claude Code and agy.
